products.name: Basket Tray
products.purpose: A basket tray is an overhead cable management pathway used to route, support, and organize copper network cables between racks and cabinets. Its open basket design allows airflow and easy access while keeping high-volume cabling runs structured and serviceable.

products.name: Basket Tray | 12in | 300mm | Wide
products.purpose: A sized basket tray section is a width-specific segment of an overhead cable basket used to route and support large bundles of copper network cabling. It provides a ventilated, accessible pathway that simplifies adds, moves, and changes in dense data center rows.

products.name: Basket Tray | 2in | Divider Strip
products.purpose: A basket tray divider strip separates cable bundles within a basket tray pathway. It helps segregate power and data runs, reduces cross-talk or interference, and keeps high-density cable paths organized and easier to maintain.

products.name: Basket Tray | 4in | 100mm | Wide
products.purpose: A sized basket tray section is a width-specific segment of an overhead cable basket used to route and support large bundles of copper network cabling. It provides a ventilated, accessible pathway that simplifies adds, moves, and changes in dense data center rows.

products.name: Basket Tray | 6in | 150mm | Wide
products.purpose: A sized basket tray section is a width-specific segment of an overhead cable basket used to route and support large bundles of copper network cabling. It provides a ventilated, accessible pathway that simplifies adds, moves, and changes in dense data center rows.

products.name: Basket Tray | 8in | 200mm | Wide
products.purpose: A sized basket tray section is a width-specific segment of an overhead cable basket used to route and support large bundles of copper network cabling. It provides a ventilated, accessible pathway that simplifies adds, moves, and changes in dense data center rows.

products.name: Basket Tray | Additional Cable Exit | Vertical Drop
products.description: Basket Tray | Additional Cable Exit | Vertical Drop
products.purpose: A basket tray cable exit accessory creates a managed vertical transition from an overhead basket tray into equipment rows. It organizes cable drops, reduces strain on conductors, and keeps pathways neat at the point where trunk cabling meets cabinets or racks.

products.name: Basket Tray | Cable Dropout Kit
products.purpose: A basket tray dropout kit provides a structured exit point for cables leaving an overhead basket tray. It controls bend radius and routing at the drop location so cables enter racks or cabinets without snagging, kinking, or exceeding minimum bend limits.

products.name: Basket Tray | RADT90 Radius Shield
products.purpose: A basket tray radius shield protects cables at tray bends and transitions. It enforces a controlled bend radius through turns and junctions, reducing the risk of damage to copper conductors and helping maintain cable performance in overhead pathways.

products.name: Basket Tray | Water Fall Dropout
products.purpose: A basket tray dropout kit provides a structured exit point for cables leaving an overhead basket tray. It controls bend radius and routing at the drop location so cables enter racks or cabinets without snagging, kinking, or exceeding minimum bend limits.
